commands.review_summary:
The PR changes package-update restart recovery so a failed updated-install service refresh no longer stops the recovery path before trying the updated install's `gateway restart`, with a focused regression test for stale gateway replacement.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +75. Total +78 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: Do we have a high-confidence way to reproduce the issue? Source inspection and the PR's mock regression show the branch: `refreshGatewayServiceEnv` failure on a package update currently returns false before restart recovery, but no live current-main managed-service reproduction was provided.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] This should stay in normal PR review because the remaining blocker is real managed-service behavior proof, not a narrow code repair ClawSweeper can supply for the contributor.

target.title: fix(update): recover package gateway restart after refresh failure
target.body:
Summary
- Continue package-update restart recovery when refreshing the managed gateway service environment from the updated install fails.
- Prefer the updated install's `gateway restart` path after refresh failure so unmanaged/stale gateway listeners can be replaced by the newer CLI.
- Add regression coverage for the observed stale-gateway sequence: refresh fails, first probe sees the old version, updated-root restart runs, second probe sees the new version.

Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `git diff --check`

Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Package-manager update could install the new OpenClaw package but stop restart recovery when `gateway install --force` failed, leaving an old gateway process serving the port.
Real environment tested: Local focused Vitest regression in a fresh worktree from current `origin/main`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/update-cli.test.ts`
Evidence after fix: The regression covers refresh failure, an old gateway version on the first probe, updated-root `gateway restart`, and the expected new gateway version on the follow-up probe.
Observed result after fix: `src/cli/update-cli.test.ts` passed: 130 tests passed.
What was not tested: A live macOS LaunchAgent/headless update run; this PR adds unit coverage for the orchestration path only.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
